a solution you're trying to find or a problem you're trying to solve. And just ask your very powerful computer, your subconscious mind, you know, if you can think about this overnight, great. And that's a tremendous difference between what I'm recommending and what most goal-setting people will tell you, give yourself a deadline, really push yourself hard. ## [27:18 - 30:20]

And think big. When motivated correctly, your subconscious mind can achieve almost anything, so think big. Of elephants and fleas. This is a very interesting example. There was one reporter who went to the circus to see how the circus elephants and animals were being treated. And he never saw a circus before behind the scenes. So he went to where the elephants were being kept. And he saw on the adult elephants there was like a tiny little rope attached to a light stake. And for the baby elephants there was a giant chain attached to a very heavy stake. And the reporter said, don't you guys have this backwards here? Doesn't the big one need the heavy chain and the little guy need the rope? He says, no, no, that's not how it works. We have to put the heavy chain on the baby elephant's leg because elephants are very strong. And he's rambunctious and he wants to start moving and wandering around. We can't let him do that. He's not going to hear himself. So that chain is needed because he doesn't know his limitations yet. So he'll fight and he'll want to run and that heavy chain is what we need to keep him in place. After enough struggles against that chain, all we need is a little rope to keep it. When he sees that on his leg, he'll never even try to get away. And that's why the big elephants have that little rope on them. They don't need anything. They've been so trained that their limitation is defined by that thing around their ankle that they can't go very far. And we humans have those chains on us in very, very many ways. So many tapes that play in our minds from people who maybe didn't believe in what we could achieve as we got older and smarter and allowed ourselves to be educated in different ways. We are still bound by that little chain on us and maybe it's become just a little rope that you can break very easily if you just don't accept those initial tapes. Sometimes we just have been very self-critical that we play for ourselves. You just take those chains and those ropes off and you can really run. And the most important thing of all is to review this little card every day for your major life goal or goals. You can do them for each major goal you want to experience. And to review it because just like the airplane heading to San Francisco, you're going to run into a storm and you want to self-correct as soon as possible. And reading that card every day, just make a little ritual, have it do it with your coffee or whatever before you go to bed and you'll get back on track and be re-excited about where you're going.
